name: Movida Participacoes S.A.
summary: Movida Participa竏堙可ｬﾃ溪嫄ﾃ可ｬﾂｵes S.A., through its subsidiaries, provides car rental services in Brazil. It also offers light vehicle fleet management and outsourcing services. In addition, the company sells used cars through its stores. As of December 31, 2019 it operated 258 stores comprising 191 car rental stores and 67 used car stores, as well as a fleet of 109,661 vehicles. It has strategic alliance with Avis Budget Car Rental, LLC.
